verses.8: The Lord GOD has sworn by Himself—the LORD, the God of Hosts, has declared:
verses.9: And if there are ten men left in one house, they too will die.
verses.10: And when the relative who is to burn the bodies picks them up to remove them from the house, he will call to one inside, “Is anyone else with you?” “None,” that person will answer. “Silence,” the relative will retort, “for the name of the LORD must not be invoked.”
verses.11: For the LORD gives a command:
verses.14: declares the LORD, the God of Hosts,
